# PlaceListNavigationTemplate

::: warning Experimental
Import from `react-native-automotive/experimental`. Inherited from `birkir/react-native-carplay`, not in the v1 roster.
:::

**Android-only.** Navigation variant of `PlaceListMapTemplate` — designed for the "list of route alternatives" scenario.

```ts
import { PlaceListNavigationTemplate } from 'react-native-automotive/experimental';
```

## Source

[`packages/core/src/experimental/PlaceListNavigationTemplate.ts`](https://github.com/dotommy/react-native-automotive/blob/master/packages/core/src/experimental/PlaceListNavigationTemplate.ts)
